principles.name: Representation
principles.description: Offer multiple means of presenting information and knowledge

checkpoints.name: Offer options for customising the display of information

guidelines.name: Language and Symbols
guidelines.description: Options for comprehending language and symbols

checkpoints.name: Support decoding of text, mathematical notation, and symbols
Address biases in the use of language and symbols
Highlight patterns, critical features, big ideas, and relationships
Cultivate multiple ways of knowing and making meaning

principles.name: Action and Expression
principles.description: Offer multiple means for learners to express what they know

guidelines.name: Interaction
guidelines.description: Options for interacting with content and environment

checkpoints.name: Vary and honour the methods for response, navigation, and movement
Optimise access to tools and assistive technologies
Use multiple tools for construction, composition, and creativity
Support fluencies with graduated support and feedback

principles.name: Engagement
principles.description: Offer multiple means of motivating and sustaining learner engagement

guidelines.name: Welcoming Interests and Identities
guidelines.description: Options for welcoming learner interests and identities

guidelines.name: Sustaining Effort and Persistence
guidelines.description: Options for sustaining effort and persistence

checkpoints.name: Heighten salience of goals and objectives
Vary demands and resources to optimise challenge
Foster collaboration, interdependence, and collective learning
Promote awareness of self, learning community, and connections
Support personal coping skills and strategies
